stories.title: Carolina's jock and nerd alliance created perfect ...
stories.summary: Coach Rod Brind'Amour and GM Eric Tulsky blended the perfect recipe, creating a team that won its first Cup in 20 years -- and will be back for more.

stories.title: Peterson visits Wizards, won't meet other teams
stories.summary: Top NBA draft prospect Darryn Peterson has visited the Wizards but does not plan to grant another team a meeting, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Hurricanes win Game 6, raise Cup for second time
stories.summary: Taylor Hall and Jackson Blake each scored their seventh goal of the playoffs and Nikolaj Ehlers had an empty-net tally as the Hurricanes topped the Golden Knights 3-0 in Game 6 to claim the franchise's second Stanley Cup.

stories.title: White: UFC at White House 'great,' never again
stories.summary: UFC president and CEO Dana White was proud of his promotion's White House event but also made clear that "we'll never do this again."

stories.title: Deion on gambling scandal: 'Something's wrong'
stories.summary: Colorado coach Deion Sanders says "something's wrong with that" when it comes to someone gambling on their own team.
